tap_map_for_move_point: Tap the map to move the point
secure_tips_desc: Piawai never asks for your password or OTP code via WhatsApp, Email, or phone. Make sure all communication happens only within the app for extra security.
complete_about_me: Complete your personal information to build trust with customers.
location_permanent: Location permission is permanently disabled. Open settings to enable it.
the_app_need_location: The app needs location access to show workers near you.
email_contact_description: Email used for login and securing your account.

general.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

field_hints.service_name_info: Fill in the service name then tap "Generate AI"
field_hints.about_me_bio: Tell us about your experience and skills here to attract service seekers...
field_hints.about_me_info: A complete profile with an attractive description has 3x more chances of getting orders.

validator.password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters
validator.username_min: Username must be at least 3 characters
validator.username_invalid: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores

validator.email_same: Email is the same as the current one.

cari_bantuan.title: Find Help
cari_bantuan.search_worker_hint: Search by name or service type...

siap_bantu.title: Ready to Help
siap_bantu.profil_already_complete: Your profile is complete and active! Service seekers can now find you.
siap_bantu.profile_complete_not_active: Your profile is complete! Activate your status so service seekers can find you.
siap_bantu.profile_not_already: Complete your profile to be more easily found by service seekers near you.
siap_bantu.information_profile_desc: Show your face! A complete profile makes service seekers more trusting and comfortable contacting you.
siap_bantu.information_contact_desc: Make sure your number and email are active so you don't miss any job offers.
siap_bantu.tap_set_location: Tap "Set Location" to set a point
siap_bantu.radius_range_desc: This radius determines how far your profile will appear in customer searches. You will only receive notifications from this area.
siap_bantu.activate_to_start: Activate to start being visible to service seekers near you.
siap_bantu.status_is_active: When status is active, your profile will appear in customer search results according to the area and services you have set.
siap_bantu.status_is_not_active: Status inactive. Your profile will not appear in customer searches.
siap_bantu.voice_hint: Tell us about the service you want to add
siap_bantu.voice_empty: No voice detected, please try again

onboarding.slide_1_desc: Find people with specific skills around you without complicated portfolios or ratings. Instantly connect through WhatsApp.
onboarding.slide_2_desc: Activate Ready to Help mode so others can instantly discover your skills and services.
onboarding.slide_3_desc: No complicated process. No layered chats. Piawai helps people connect and solve needs faster.
